{
  "claims": [
    "The Golden State Innovation Act of 2021 aims to restore the Research and Development (R&D) Tax Credit and Net Operating Loss (NOL) deduction for Life Sciences companies in California.",
    "The reinstatement of the R&D Tax Credit and NOL for Life Sciences companies is intended to double the number of Life Science jobs in California.",
    "California is recognized as a leader in Life Sciences innovation.",
    "In 2019, venture capitalists invested $6.5 billion into California Life Sciences businesses, making it the leading state in such investments.",
    "The Life Sciences industry in California is expected to develop innovative ideas into products such as medicines and devices.",
    "Reinstating California’s Life Sciences research and development tax credit is anticipated to bolster biomedical innovation throughout the state.",
    "Highly-skilled research and development teams in California have produced anti-COVID vaccines quickly.",
    "Continued research and development are necessary to support businesses in California that are working on new treatments for COVID-19."
  ]
}
